title: Imperfect Information Cournot Duopoly Game Tree
description: An extensive-form game tree showing the sequential decision-making process of two firms (Firm 1 and Firm 2) in a Cournot duopoly under imperfect information. Firm 1 chooses its quantity first, but Firm 2 must choose its quantity without knowing Firm 1's choice, represented by a dashed line connecting Firm 2's decision nodes.
relationships: Nature assigns a cost type to Firm 1
Firm 1 observes its own type and chooses a quantity
Firm 2 does not observe Nature's move or Firm 1's quantity and must choose its own quantity
Payoffs are realized based on both quantity choices and Firm 1's hidden type
